assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with the table headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) but no data rows, or explicitly notes that no repositories are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 20-23 contain '## Repository Registry' with table headers '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' and separator '|---|---|---|---|' but no data rows follow.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 25-29 contain '## Jira Configuration' with '- Project key: MYPROJ', '- Cloud ID: abc123', '- Feature issue type ID: 10001'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that indicates no Serena instances are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 31-33 contain '## Code Intelligence' followed by 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 2 (lines 9-17) states: 'No Serena tools detected (no tools matching pattern mcp__<instance>__find_symbol, mcp__<instance>__get_symbols_overview, etc.)' and '**Result**: No Serena MCP servers discovered'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 3.1 (lines 21-23) states: 'Checked for Atlassian MCP tools (prefix mcp__atlassian__)' and '**Result**: No Atlassian MCP tools found'. Step 3.2 (lines 25-27) states: 'User chose option 2: manual entry (skip auto-discovery)'. Step 3.4 (lines 29-35) documents manual entry of all Jira fields.

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 2 line 16 states: 'User chose to continue without code intelligence'. This indicates the user was prompted about continuing without code intelligence.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 39-43 contain '## Bug Configuration' with '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 10 (lines 108-112) states: 'No existing Security Configuration found', 'User declined to enable security triage', 'Skipped — Security Configuration will not be created'. claude-md-result.md does not contain any '## Security Configuration' section — the file ends after '## Hierarchy Configuration' at line 47.
